name: Belo Horizonte (Brazil)

colors.symbolism: elements of the coat of arms (gold of the Minas Gerais mining tradition)
elements of the coat of arms (sky over the Serra do Curral)
elements of the coat of arms (vegetation)
elements of the coat of arms

description: A white field charged in the centre with the municipal coat of arms of Belo Horizonte, with a diameter of three-quarters of the flag's height.
history: Belo Horizonte was founded in 1897 as a planned new capital of Minas Gerais state. Its municipal coat of arms was instituted in 1937 and underwent successive revisions until Municipal Law No. 6,938 of 19 August 1995 restored the basic original design in a more classically heraldic rendition; the law also fixes the dimensions of the flag (the arms occupy three-quarters of the height of the central white field). A 2024 referendum on a redesigned alternative flag was rejected by the city's voters.

features.symbolism: plain white field bearing the municipal coat of arms

features.role: coat of arms of the Municipality of Belo Horizonte
features.symbolism: the city's coat of arms, instituted in 1937 and restored to its classically heraldic form by Law 6,938/1995, depicts the Serra do Curral horizon (from which the city takes its name, Belo Horizonte — "beautiful horizon") and emblems of the mineral wealth of Minas Gerais; per the law it spans three-quarters of the flag's height
